_doc: Stand-in for the MUnitQuest metadata form. Edit these values, then run generate_metadata.js.

dataset.name: MUnitQuest Example Dataset
dataset.description: Example HDsEMG recordings of isometric knee extension and dorsiflexion contractions with motor unit decomposition.

pipelines.name: MUEdit
pipelines.description: Convolutive blind source separation for HDsEMG decomposition in MATLAB.

editingTools.name: MUEdit
editingTools.description: Convolutive blind source separation for HDsEMG decomposition in MATLAB.
